summary: Tested AI Avatar Generation feature for CineWorld Studio's. All backend tests pass (13/13). Frontend tests pass - avatar displays correctly in profile page and navbar, 'Genera con AI' dialog works properly.

issues: Minor: Missing DialogDescription for accessibility (console warning)

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper error handling
Avatar URL format correctly uses /api/avatar/image/{filename} for Kubernetes ingress routing
persist_base64_avatar function properly converts legacy base64 avatars to file URLs
seed_data_creation: Used existing admin user: fandrex1@gmail.com / Fandrel2776
context_for_next_testing_agent: Avatar generation feature is fully working. Existing avatar file at /app/backend/uploads/avatars/25e2aa00-d353-4ecf-9a89-b3959520ea5c.png can be used for testing GET /api/avatar/image/{filename}. AI generation takes 30-60 seconds. Test credentials: fandrex1@gmail.com / Fandrel2776 (admin), test@cineworld.com / TestCoadmin123! (co-admin).
verified_features: GET /api/avatar/image/{filename} - returns 200 with image/png for existing files, 404 for non-existent
POST /api/avatar/generate - requires auth, generates AI avatar, returns avatar_url in /api/avatar/image/ format
PUT /api/auth/avatar - requires auth, updates user avatar_url and avatar_source
Login returns correct avatar_url format for users with AI-generated avatars
Frontend ProfilePage: 'Genera con AI' button opens dialog with prompt input and preset suggestions
Frontend: Avatar image displays correctly in navbar and profile page (not broken/404)
